general: Tell me about yourself in 90 seconds.
What's a real failure you owned and what changed afterwards?
Walk me through a recent decision where you had to balance speed and quality.
Why this company and why now?
What questions do you have for me?
Describe a time you had to give difficult feedback to a peer.
Where do you want to be in three years and how does this role fit?
engineering: Walk through the architecture of the most complex system you've built.
Describe a time you reduced incident frequency or on-call load in production.
How do you decide when to refactor versus ship?
Tell me about a technical disagreement you lost. What did you learn?
What's the worst bug you've shipped, and how did you find and fix it?
How do you scope a project when requirements are ambiguous?
Describe your approach to code review when you're the senior engineer in the room.
data: Walk me through an analysis where the data changed your initial hypothesis.
How do you decide between a simple model and a more complex one?
Tell me about a time you found a data quality issue. How did you handle it?
How do you communicate model limitations to non-technical stakeholders?
Describe a pipeline you built end-to-end — ingestion, transformation, serving.
How do you evaluate whether an A/B test result is actually significant?
Walk through a metric you defined for a product team. Why that metric?
design: Walk me through a recent project from problem framing to shipped UI.
Tell me about a design decision you made that was unpopular with the team.
How do you balance brand consistency with experimentation?
Describe how you incorporate user research into a tight sprint.
What's a piece of feedback that changed how you approach design?
How do you measure whether a design is successful after launch?
Walk me through how you handle accessibility in your workflow.
product: Walk through a product decision where you said no to a high-profile request.
How do you prioritize when engineering, design, and sales all want different things?
Tell me about a launch that underperformed. What did you do next?
How do you write a PRD — what goes in, what stays out?
Describe a metric you owned and the lever you used to move it.
How do you decide when to kill a feature?
Walk through how you'd discover whether a new market is worth entering.
marketing: Walk me through a campaign you ran end-to-end — strategy, execution, results.
Tell me about a channel you scaled from nothing to a meaningful share of pipeline.
How do you measure brand work that doesn't have direct attribution?
Describe a positioning shift you led. What was the catalyst?
How do you decide between paid and organic investment in a quarter?
Tell me about a time you killed a campaign mid-flight. Why?
What's your process for understanding a new customer segment?
sales: Walk me through your largest deal — from prospect to close.
Tell me about a deal you lost. What would you do differently?
How do you handle a champion who suddenly goes dark mid-cycle?
Describe your discovery process — what are you trying to learn in the first call?
How do you forecast a quarter? Walk me through your method.
Tell me about a time you turned a no into a yes.
How do you partner with product or marketing to fix repeated objections?
writing: Walk me through how you research a piece on a topic you don't know well.
Tell me about an editor's note that fundamentally changed a draft.
How do you adapt voice for different audiences within the same brand?
Describe a piece that performed unexpectedly well or poorly. What did you learn?
How do you handle a topic where sources disagree or evidence is thin?
Walk through your editing process for someone else's draft.
What's a recent style or workflow change you've adopted and why?
operations: Walk through a process you redesigned. What was broken and what changed?
Tell me about a cross-functional initiative you drove with no formal authority.
How do you decide what to automate versus what to leave manual?
Describe a time you caught a compliance or risk issue before it escalated.
How do you prioritize work when every stakeholder thinks theirs is urgent?
Tell me about a vendor relationship you renegotiated. What was the outcome?
Walk me through how you'd onboard into a function you've never run before.
support: Walk me through how you handle an angry customer who's been escalated to you.
Tell me about a recurring ticket pattern you spotted and escalated to product.
How do you balance speed of response with quality of resolution?
Describe a knowledge base or documentation improvement you drove.
How do you handle a request that falls outside what the product can do today?
Tell me about a time you trained or coached a teammate through a tough case.
What metrics do you actually care about in a support org and why?
security: Walk me through an incident you led the response on. What went right and wrong?
How do you prioritize vulnerabilities when you have more findings than capacity?
Tell me about a control you implemented that engineering pushed back on.
Describe your approach to threat modeling a new system.
How do you communicate risk to non-security executives?
Walk me through how you'd evaluate a third-party vendor's security posture.
Tell me about a time you found something that wasn't supposed to be there.
exec: Walk me through a strategic bet you made that didn't pay off.
Tell me about how you set the operating cadence at your last company.
How do you decide when to hire from outside versus promote from within?
Describe a time you had to deliver bad news to the board or investors.
Walk through how you'd diagnose what's broken in a function in your first 60 days.
Tell me about a leader you developed. What was the arc?
How do you balance short-term financial discipline with long-term investment?
legal: Walk me through how you'd approach a contract negotiation where the other side has more leverage.
Tell me about a complex matter you handled where the law was unsettled. How did you advise the client?
Describe a time you had to deliver difficult legal advice that the business didn't want to hear.
How do you balance billable hour pressure with thorough client service?
Walk me through your approach to managing discovery on a large case.
Tell me about a compliance gap you identified and how you remediated it.
How do you handle a situation where a client wants to do something that's legal but ethically questionable?
medical: Walk me through how you'd handle a deteriorating patient when the on-call physician is unreachable.
Tell me about a time you caught a medication or treatment error before it reached the patient.
Describe a conflict with a colleague over a patient care decision and how you resolved it.
How do you maintain compassion in a high-volume, fast-paced clinical setting?
Walk me through how you'd educate a non-compliant patient about a chronic condition.
Tell me about a situation involving difficult family dynamics around end-of-life care.
How do you handle a situation where you disagree with a physician's order?
finance: Walk me through a financial model you built end-to-end and the decision it informed.
Tell me about a time your analysis changed a leadership decision.
How do you handle stakeholders pushing back on conservative forecasts?
Describe a control deficiency you identified and the remediation you led.
Walk me through how you'd value a company in a sector you've never analyzed before.
Tell me about a tough close or audit. What went wrong and what did you change next quarter?
How do you communicate financial risk to non-finance executives without burying it?
education: Walk me through a lesson that fell flat and what you changed for the next attempt.
Tell me about a struggling student you turned around. What worked?
How do you differentiate instruction for a class with a wide range of abilities?
Describe a difficult conversation with a parent. How did you handle it?
Walk through how you'd redesign a unit that students consistently disengage from.
Tell me about how you incorporate student feedback into your teaching practice.
How do you balance covering required curriculum with going deep on student interests?
creative: Walk me through a project from creative brief to delivered asset.
Tell me about a time a client or stakeholder wanted something you knew wouldn't work. How did you handle it?
Describe how you take direction without losing your point of view.
How do you stay sharp creatively when working on repetitive briefs?
Walk through your process for tackling a brief outside your usual style or medium.
Tell me about a piece you were proud of that didn't perform commercially. What did you learn?
How do you collaborate with copywriters, strategists, or developers on a single deliverable?
hospitality: Walk me through how you'd handle a guest complaint that escalated to corporate.
Tell me about a busy service where everything went wrong. What did you do?
How do you motivate a team during a slow shift or off-season?
Describe how you'd onboard a new hire during a peak weekend.
Walk through how you control food cost or labor cost without hurting the guest experience.
Tell me about a time you turned a one-star review into a loyal regular.
How do you handle a teammate not pulling their weight during service?
trades: Walk me through the most complex job you've completed start to finish.
Tell me about a safety issue you identified on site and how you handled it.
Describe a job that went sideways. What was the root cause and what did you do?
How do you read and translate blueprints or specs for an apprentice?
Walk through how you estimate materials and time for a new job.
Tell me about a time you had to push back on a customer's request because it wasn't up to code.
How do you stay current with code changes and new techniques in your trade?
science: Walk me through a research project where the results were unexpected. What did you do next?
Tell me about a failed experiment that taught you the most.
How do you decide what to publish versus what to hold for a follow-up paper?
Describe a collaboration where you and another lab disagreed. How was it resolved?
Walk through how you'd onboard a new grad student or intern to your project.
Tell me about a grant or funding decision you had to argue for.
How do you balance depth in your specialty with staying current across adjacent fields?
